prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **CZEA 1.8 TFSI (EA888 Gen3)** engine, targeting 320 HP and 400 Nm with a **Garrett GT2867R turbocharger**, **MagnaFlow 3" cat-back exhaust with resonated delete**, and **034 Motorsport high-pressure fuel pump** to support E30-E40 ethanol blends via a **Syvecs flex-fuel sensor**

KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with **Audi A1 8X-specific spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)** and **OMP adjustable top mounts** for camber correction, paired with **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)** to eliminate subframe deflection

Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines**, matched with **BBS CH-R 18x8.5 ET35 wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (225/35/18)** for optimal heat cycling
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (A1 8X-specific) with **custom carbon fiber fenders (25mm wider front, 30mm wider rear)**, **VMR V710 18x9.5 ET25 wheels** in matte bronze, and **custom rear diffuser with integrated twin 3.5" exhaust outlets**

Full **Audi Sport S1 front bumper conversion** with **carbon fiber lip spoiler (Verus Engineering)** and **custom LED DRL delete (blacked-out housing with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs)** for a stealth OEM+ look

Recaro Sportster CS seats (A1-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in **Alcantara with red contrast stitching (Sparco Assetto Gara material)**, paired with a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** and **custom carbon fiber shift knob (034 Motorsport)**
